    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MCPLabels.addLabel(String domainName, LabelType type, Label label)
    Adds a domain variable to this class.
    MCPBitVector
    MCPFactory.getLabel(String domainName, Label value)
    Returns a bit vector representing the given label in the specified domain.
    Set<Integer>
    MCPLabels.getLabelECs(String domainName, Label var)
    Retrieves the set of ECs for a specific static variable within a given domain.
    MCPBitVector
    MCPFactory.getLabelFillOtherDomain(String domainName, Label value)
    Returns a bit vector for the given label in one domain, and true in all other domains.
    boolean
    MCPLabels.isContain(String domainName, Label var1, Label var2)
    Checks if one static variable contains another within a given domain.
